variants.title: Fleetguard 3833692S Lube Filter Service Part | Replaces the Donaldson X002019
variants.description: Service products include Fleetguard® 3833692S, stack cap.  Fleetguard offers a one stop shop of lube filtration products covering the widest scope of engine applications in the on and off highway markets.

variants.title: Donaldson X002019 Inlet Hood, Metal
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson X002019 Inlet Hood, Metal is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
